trash.title: 🗑 Trash & Recycling
trash.warn: In Korea, sorting your trash is required by law. Incorrect disposal can result in a fine, so please follow these steps carefully.
trash.general: General waste — must go in an official volume-based bag (jongnyangje bongtu, 종량제 봉투), put out at the designated spot.
trash.food: Food waste — goes in a separate food-waste bag, put out at the designated spot. (Keep it apart from general waste.)
trash.recycle: Recycling — place in the white plastic bag and put out at the designated spot. Rinse containers when possible.
trash.days: Collection days — Sunday to Thursday. (No trash out on Fri/Sat.)
trash.bags: Official garbage bags are sold at any nearby convenience store or supermarket — just ask for "종량제 봉투" (jongnyangje bongtu). Regular plastic bags are not accepted for general waste.
rules.title: 🏢 House Rules
rules.smoking: No smoking — smoking is prohibited inside the unit and in the hallways.
rules.noise: Quiet hours — please keep noise down between 21:00 and 08:00 out of respect for neighbors.
rules.visitors: No visitors or guests beyond the registered occupants.
rules.hallway: Please help keep the shared entrance and hallways clean.
emergency.title: ☎️ Emergency Contacts
emergency.host.title: Contacting your host
emergency.host.messenger: Platform messenger — the best way to reach us.
emergency.host.kakao: KakaoTalk ID: pingkearu — for day-to-day questions during your stay. KakaoTalk is Korea's main messaging app; installing it before you arrive makes it easy to reach us.
emergency.numbers.title: Emergency numbers (no area code needed, free from any phone)
emergency.1330: 1330 — Korea Travel Helpline (24 hours, English and other languages; can interpret over the phone)
